messages.body: Hi, once again I am reaching out because I want my service terminated with Zoca. I have sent emails and mesages and this doesnt seem to get resolved. I sent an email on Oct 1st and Oct 3rd requesting to terminate service…
Hello Nidia,  I’m so sorry about this!  Your account will be cancelled and the November payment will be refunded back to your account 👍🏼
Yes i was. i have a call for cancellation on Thursday morning.
Hello Nidia,  Hope you’re doing well!  Any update on this? Were you able to do this?

Hello Nidia,  This is Monisha, Senior Account Manager.   Please initiate the off-boarding from the Zoca app directly.   1. Navigate to “More” from the homepage 2. Click on “Support” and “delete account”  Post a call woul…
Hi, I was out on vacation and couldnt message you sooner. Im taking a different route with my marketing.

Also, I would just like to cease the service altogether now. I understand its been paid through the rest of the month but i no longer wish clients or future clients going through the Zoca website. Thank you.
